moments.author: Giannis Antetokounmpo
moments.quote: The city of Milwaukee will always be in my heart… Milwaukee will always be my city, my team, my family.
moments.why: Giannis’s heartfelt goodbye to Milwaukee sent X into overdrive amid one of the biggest trades in NBA history.

moments.author: Pat Riley
moments.quote: One of the great trades in HEAT history… Giannis is one of the top five players in the league.
moments.why: A bold declaration from Heat president underscoring the magnitude of acquiring Giannis.
moments.url: Link to Miami HEAT’s post quoting Riley
